prompt: Create a vertical anime-style stained-glass chapel window featuring an original young girl as the central sacred-window portrait. The scene is inside a grand Gothic cathedral with tall stone columns, pointed arches, carved capitals, and a polished stone floor reflecting colored light. The central window is a huge arched stained-glass panel filling most of the frame, bordered by ornate leading and jewel-like glass trim. Depict the character in a graceful half-body side profile, looking softly toward the viewer, with the face and eyes kept cute and delicate; use warm blonde hair styled in loose wavy strands and a side bun decorated with blue and purple glass flowers. Dress her in a translucent layered blue and lavender fantasy gown with ribbons, floral ornaments, ruffles, and shimmering glass-petal details. Reconstruct the entire character, hair, outfit, skin, flowers, and background from visible stained-glass pieces with thin dark lead lines, faceted translucent glass textures, cracks, sparkles, and luminous highlights. Include exactly 3 prominent blue flower decorations on the outfit and hair, plus smaller purple and white blossoms woven through the border. Behind her, create a deep blue night-sky stained-glass halo with many stars, a crescent moon near the upper right, circular celestial motifs, and pale icy-blue glass around her head. Add colored reflections from the stained glass falling across the chapel walls, columns, and floor, especially blue, violet, pink, and gold patches. Use a reverent, magical, highly detailed illustration style blending anime beauty with realistic cathedral architecture, radiant backlighting, intricate glass mosaic craftsmanship, and a sacred, precious atmosphere. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
